title: bdrmppl
role_summary: Act referenced in an alphabets split tape folder (2012). Identity unconfirmed; possibly "bedroom people." The archive folder for the split tape is empty.
body:
# bdrmppl

An act referenced by the archive folder `split tape w_ bdrmppl` (dated July 20, 2012). The folder is empty — no audio files are present, suggesting the split tape was either never completed, the files were moved, or the folder is a placeholder.

"bdrmppl" likely abbreviates "bedroom people" — a name consistent with the bedroom-pop/lo-fi aesthetics of the early 2010s DIY scene. Whether this was a Denver act or an online connection is unknown.

## Archive Notes

- Folder: `_Documentation/Music/alphabets/split tape w_ bdrmppl`
- Folder date: 2012-07-20
- Empty folder — no audio files present
- Confidence low: only the folder name provides any information

## Research Gaps

- Who is bdrmppl? Real name, location, other releases?
- Was the split tape ever completed or released?
- Did the files exist and get lost, or was the collaboration never finished?
- "bdrmppl" search: any results on Bandcamp, SoundCloud, or other platforms?
